Conclusion.html.source: The last section of this survey references your earlier responses to determine how {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP developed over time and what factors may have played a role in the LP/GOLPP progression.

ConclusionsPanelLifeStatusTrueText.html.source: NOTE: These questions ask about the last station of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP journey before {cvGenderSubjectPronoun} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge. If it's too painful to revisit this stage of {CmpnName}'s life, it might be best to discontinue the survey and return to it later.

ConclusionsPanelLifeStatusFalseText.html.source: IMPORTANT: Please answer the questions about {CmpnName} in {cvGenderObjectPronoun} current state of health:

ConclusionSpecialConsiderations.title.source: Please describe any special considerations for {CmpnName} due to LP-related breathing issues:

ConclusionSpecialConsiderations.choices..source: Type, amount or frequency of feeding
Other behavior restrictions i.e., anxiety, excitement

ConclusionQOL.title.source: How would you rate {CmpnName}'s quality of life at this stage?

ConclusionOtherConditionsNew.title.source: Did {CmpnName} develop any new conditions during {cvGenderObjectPronoun} LP/GOLPP journey that {cvGenderSubjectPronoun} didn't have before?

ConclusionOtherConditions.title.source: What other conditions did {CmpnName} develop during {cvGenderObjectPronoun} LP/GOLPP journey?

ConclusionOtherConditions.description.source: The selections you made about the beginning of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP journey are preselected.

ConclusionCauseOfDeathHeading.html.source: Euthanasia is a humane way to say goodbye when a beloved animal companion has reached end-of-life. This question asks about the primary cause of {CmpnName}'s passing, not whether humane euthanasia was chosen to help them cross over.

ConclusionCauseOfDeath.title.source: What was the ultimate reason why {CmpnName} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge?

ConclusionCauseOfDeath.choices.COMPLICAT.source: Post-op complications of LP-related surgical procedure

ConclusionCauseOfDeath.choices.QOL_POLYN.source: Quality of life due to polyneuropathy or hind-end weakness

ConclusionCauseOfDeath.choices.QOL_BREAT.source: Quality of life due to LP-related breathing problems

ConclusionOtherPathPanel.title.source: These questions are speculative. If you were to have another dog with LP, would you choose a different path along their LP/GOLPP journey?

ConclusionOtherPathTieback.title.source: What if anything would you differently?

ConclusionOtherPathTieback.choices.TIEBA.source: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do tieback surgery again
I would do tieback surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do tieback surgery longer than I did with {CmpnName}

ConclusionOtherPathBVEAP.title.source: Faced with the same decisions with another LP/GOLPP companion, what if anything would you differently?

ConclusionOtherPathBVEAP.choices.BVEAP_S.source: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}

ConclusionOtherPathBVEAP.choices.BVEAP_N.source: I would not do BVEAP surgery again

ConclusionOtherPathBVEAP.choices.BVEAP_L.source: I would wait to do BVEAP surgery longer than I did with {CmpnName}

ConclusionOtherPathStent.choices.STENT_N.source: I would not do the laryngeal stent implant again

ConclusionOtherPathStent.choices.STENT_L.source: I would wait to do a laryngeal stent implant longer than I did with {CmpnName}
